nasb.text: Then you counted the houses of Jerusalem And tore down houses to fortify the wall.

esv.text: and you counted the houses of Jerusalem, and you broke down the houses to fortify the wall.

cnv.text: 你們又數點耶路撒冷的房屋， 把房屋拆掉，用來堅固城牆。

ccb.text: 数点耶路撒冷城的房屋，把房屋拆掉修补城墙。

csbs.text: 你们数点耶路撒冷的房屋，把房屋拆掉，用来加固城墙；
